title: Citrus Child Lifestyle Editorial AI
sourceTitle: Citrus Child Lifestyle Editorial AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Playful citrus-themed lifestyle editorial portrait of a joyful little child with a bright cheerful smile and expressive eyes with fresh oranges, floating orange slices, and a playful citrus crown. Subject: a joyful little child with a bright cheerful smile and expressive eyes wears a beige plaid shirt with an orange sweater draped over the shoulders and tied in front and interacts with fresh oranges, floating orange slices, and a playful citrus crown through sitting cross-legged while smelling a freshly cut orange. Scene: a minimalist pastel-green studio provides a clean monochrome background with warm sunlight, soft shadows, cheerful studio freshness, and premium lifestyle polish. Composition: Fixed vertical editorial portrait with the child seated cross-legged on the studio floor, fruit elements floating around the subject, shallow depth, creamy bokeh, and candid expression focus. Style: Ultra-realistic premium children lifestyle photography with playful fruit styling, high-end magazine photoshoot quality, natural skin tones, detailed fabric texture, and cinematic commercial composition. Color Palette: Fixed vibrant orange and pastel green palette with beige fabric neutrals, warm sunlight, and fresh citrus accents. Lighting: Warm natural sunlight, soft studio shadows, gentle skin highlights, and bright cheerful contrast. Camera: 85mm portrait lens, f/1.8 shallow depth of field, sharp eyes, creamy background blur, and realistic studio perspective. Signature Elements: Floating orange slices, citrus crown, fresh orange prop, playful facial expression, cross-legged floor pose, and clean pastel-green studio. Restrictions: Keep the child fully clothed, cheerful, natural, age-appropriate, brand-free, watermark-free, and anatomically stable.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
